songs.title: Father Figure
feed: “Father Figure” by Taylor Swift spends a 2nd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.

“Father Figure” by Taylor Swift is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 605,682 total units.
